## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test`, `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` pass
- [ ] New behaviour has a test; a bug fix has a test that fails without it
- [ ] No new dependency (or it was discussed first)
